name: Lieutenant Kess
portraitPrompt: fantasy character portrait, scout lieutenant grim, snowfall, torchlight on armor, painterly, no text

dialogue.greeting: We end this now, or we end it later with more graves.

nodes.text:
The Warlord’s survivors are rallying at the fortress-heart.

Expect:
- chokepoints,
- skirmish lines,
- and a ritual meant to turn desperation into power.

If you carry the war-map tablet, we’ll avoid the worst traps.

If you have the oracle’s advantage, we’ll see ambushes before they breathe.

If you destroyed it… we fight honest.

Ready?
